---
title: "Dimensionality reduction"
subtitle: "Principal component analysis"
date: "Oct 23, 2026"
date-format: long
---

PCA as variance maximization and as a reconstruction problem; the SVD; choosing the number of components; PCR as a regression follow-up.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR §6.3

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- ✏️ [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)  *(in-class version)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Novembre et al. (2008)](readings/Novembre et al. (2008).pdf)
- 📄 [Zhang and Castelló  (2017)](readings/Zhang and Castelló  (2017).pdf)

## 🧪 Lab

In-class walkthrough — open the rendered lab in a new tab. The R Markdown source is provided so you can run the code yourself in RStudio.

- 🧪 [class9 lab1 (HTML)](code/class9_lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 📝 [Lab source (class9_lab1.Rmd)](code/class9_lab1.Rmd)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)
